title: stachys caffra
intro: Stachys caffra, commonly known as the woolly hedgenettle, is a perennial herb native to South Africa with a distinctive appearance and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and roots have been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and fever, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Stachys caffra include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory problems.
